/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -current_version 0.9.7 -o ../../bin/libggml.0.9.7.dylib -install_name @rpath/libggml.0.dylib "CMakeFiles/ggml.dir/ggml-backend-dl.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml.dir/ggml-backend-reg.cpp.o"  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/kevin/Desktop/p2pllms/llama/llamasrc/build/bin ../../bin/libggml-cpu.0.9.7.dylib ../../bin/libggml-blas.0.9.7.dylib ../../bin/libggml-metal.0.9.7.dylib ../../bin/libggml-base.0.9.7.dylib
